description: URLs confirmed live by manual/browser check but which refuse automated requests (connection reset/timeout) from CI runners. For these, the scheduled source health check downgrades CONNECTION-LEVEL failures to warnings. A definite HTTP error status (e.g. 404, 410) still fails the check even for an allowlisted URL, so genuine rot is never masked. Re-verify on the 'verified' date cadence.

allow.reason: India Central Pollution Control Board NAMP page; live in browser but blocks automated access.
CPCB monitoring network page; live in browser but blocks automated access.
India Commission for Air Quality Management; live in browser but blocks automated access.
Health Effects Institute State of Global Air platform; returns 200 but drops connection before full transfer, blocking automated access.
NASA Global Landslide Hazard portal; live (200 header) but drops connection mid-transfer, blocking automated access.
ICIMOD homepage; returns 403 to automated requests but is fully accessible in browser.
DHS Program NFHS-5 final report page; curl returns 200 but Node.js fetch fails — likely User-Agent blocking for automated requests.
Nepal Department of Hydrology and Meteorology; live in browser but connection times out from CI runners (DNS/firewall blocking).
Atmospheric Chemistry and Physics journal (Copernicus); live in browser but connection fails from CI runners.
ERA5-Land reanalysis article (Copernicus ESSD); live in browser but connection fails from CI runners.
UNESCO IOC homepage; live in browser but connection fails from CI runners.
NOAA NCEI IBTrACS product page; live in browser (200) but Node.js fetch fails from CI runners.
Copernicus Atmosphere Monitoring Service; live in browser but connection times out from CI runners.
PLOS Medicine article (Knowlton Ahmedabad heat action plan); live in browser but connection times out from CI runners.
NSET Nepal earthquake report; live in browser but connection times out from CI runners.
